message.content:
@startuml

box "Shopware Platform" #LightGray
participant "Checkout" as Checkout
participant "Asynchronous\nPayment Handler" as APH
end box

box "External System" #LightGray
participant "Payment Platform" as PP
end box

actor Customer as Customer

Customer -[dashed]-> Checkout : pay
Checkout -[dashed]-> PP : pay
Checkout -[dashed]-> Customer : redirect
Customer -[dashed]-> PP : pay
PP -[dashed]-> Checkout : redirect
Checkout -[dashed]-> APH : finalize

@enduml
